name: Niraegaer
bio:
Physical Appearance: Bosmer (Wood Elf) male wearing a dark green shirt with light armor. Carries laced leather pants and stitched leather shoes as spare clothing. Armed with a bow and arrows.
Race: Bosmer
Personality Keywords: assassin, criminal, hostile, aggressive, cave dweller, archer
Role: Niraegaer is an assassin hiding out with his criminal partners in Hrota Cave, located just north of Anvil. He relies on his archery skills in combat, wielding a high-quality bow with arrows that may be enchanted. He carries a small amount of gold.
Home Location Information: Hrota Cave, north of Anvil. He remains in the largest chamber of the cave.
Daily Routine: Niraegaer stays in the largest chamber of Hrota Cave at all times, never sleeping or eating. He remains vigilant and ready for combat.
Personality - The Cave Assassin: Niraegaer is hostile and aggressive, attacking intruders on sight without warning or explanation. He will not accept any attempt at surrender or negotiation.
author: Bethesda
